parameters.content:
## Podcast Episode to Complete Show Notes Generator — WayinVideo Transcription + GPT-4o-mini + Google Sheets

For podcast producers, solo hosts, and content teams who publish regularly and spend 30–60 minutes per episode writing show notes manually. Submit any podcast episode recording URL via the form. WayinVideo Transcription API transcribes the full episode with speaker labels and timestamps. A Code node formats the transcript with MM:SS speaker segments, computes duration, and sets an isInterviewEpisode flag based on whether a guest name was provided. GPT-4o-mini reads the full transcript and generates 8 labeled sections: episode title, SEO description (150–200 words), key takeaways (5–8 bullets), resources mentioned, timestamped highlights (6–8 moments), guest bio (or solo note), CTA block, and a compiled FULL_SHOW_NOTES section ready to paste directly into Spotify for Podcasters, Apple Podcasts, or a website episode page. A Code node parses all 8 sections and computes word count. Google Sheets appends 19 columns with Status set to Draft.

## How it works
- **1. Form — Episode Recording + Details** collects the recording URL, episode number, podcast name, host name, optional guest name and title, episode topic, niche, and CTA link (9 fields — guest fields are optional)
- **2. WayinVideo — Submit Transcription** submits the URL to the Transcription API
- **3. Wait — 90 Seconds** gives the API initial processing time
- **4. WayinVideo — Get Transcript Results** polls the transcripts results endpoint
- **5. IF — Transcription Complete?** checks for SUCCEEDED — if not, retries via 30-second wait
- **7. Code — Format Transcript** formats segments with speaker labels and timestamps, computes MM:SS duration, sets isInterviewEpisode flag
- **8. AI Agent — Write Show Notes** uses GPT-4o-mini with 8 labeled output sections — AI prompt adapts for interview vs solo episode format
- **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** language model attached to the AI Agent
- **10. Code — Parse Show Notes Output** extracts all 8 sections via regex and validates required fields
- **11. Google Sheets — Save Show Notes Library** appends 19 columns with Status set to Draft

## Set up steps
1. In **2** and **4** — replace `YOUR_WAYINVIDEO_API_KEY`
2. In **9. OpenAI — GPT-4o-mini Model** — connect your OpenAI credential
3. In **11. Google Sheets — Save Show Notes Library** — connect your Google Sheets OAuth2 credential and replace `YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID`
4. Create a Google Sheet tab named Show Notes Library with columns: Episode Number, Episode Title, Podcast Name, Host, Guest, Topic, Duration, Recording URL, SEO Description, Key Takeaways, Resources Mentioned, Timestamped Highlights, Guest Bio, CTA Block, Full Show Notes, Word Count, CTA Link, Generated On, Status

## Form Input
Host submits episode recording URL, episode number, podcast name, host name, optional guest name and title, episode topic, podcast niche, and CTA link. Guest fields are optional — the workflow adapts for interview vs solo episodes.

nodes.name: Section — WayinVideo Transcription Submit and Poll

parameters.content:
## WayinVideo Transcription Submit and Poll
Submits the episode recording URL to the Transcription API. Waits 90 seconds for initial processing. Polls the results endpoint until status equals SUCCEEDED.

nodes.name: Section — Transcription Status Check and Retry Loop

parameters.content:
## Transcription Status Check and Retry Loop
IF checks for SUCCEEDED status. TRUE proceeds to transcript formatting. FALSE waits 30 seconds and polls again. Loop continues until transcript is ready.

nodes.name: Section — Transcript Formatting and AI Show Notes Writing

parameters.content:
## Transcript Formatting and AI Show Notes Writing
Formats segments with speaker labels and MM:SS timestamps. Computes duration and sets isInterviewEpisode flag. GPT-4o-mini writes 8 labeled sections adapting for interview vs solo format.

nodes.name: Section — Show Notes Parse and Google Sheets Save

parameters.content:
## Show Notes Parse and Google Sheets Save
Regex extracts all 8 labeled sections. Validates required fields. Appends 19 columns to Google Sheets with Status set to Draft — ready to paste into Spotify, Apple Podcasts, or a website.

parameters.formDescription: Paste your podcast episode recording URL. AI will transcribe the full episode and generate complete show notes — SEO description, key takeaways, resources, timestamps, guest bio, and CTA — all ready to publish.

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert podcast producer and content writer who specializes in writing complete, high-quality show notes that help episodes rank on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and Google.

Read this podcast episode transcript and write a complete show notes package — based ONLY on what was actually discussed in the episode.

---

## EPISODE DETAILS
- Podcast: {{ $json.podcastName }}
- Episode: #{{ $json.episodeNumber }}
- Host: {{ $json.hostName }}
{{ $json.isInterviewEpisode === 'true' || $json.isInterviewEpisode === true ? '- Guest: ' + $json.guestName + ' (' + $json.guestTitle + ')' : '- Format: Solo Episode' }}
- Topic: {{ $json.episodeTopic }}
- Niche: {{ $json.podcastNiche }}
- Duration: {{ $json.durationFormatted }}
- Speakers detected: {{ $json.speakers }}
- CTA Link: {{ $json.ctaLink }}

---

## SHOW NOTES WRITING RULES
1. Write ONLY from the transcript — no invented content
2. SEO description must include the main topic keyword in first sentence
3. Key takeaways must be specific and actionable — not vague
4. Resources must only include things explicitly mentioned in the transcript
5. Timestamped highlights: pick 6-8 most interesting moments — exact MM:SS from transcript
6. Guest bio: write only if guest info appears in transcript — otherwise write 'Solo episode'
7. CTA block: always end with subscribe + review prompt
8. Full show notes must be ready to paste directly into Spotify for Podcasters or a website

---

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Return in this exact structure:

EPISODE_TITLE:
[Write a compelling SEO episode title — 60-70 characters — include main keyword]

SEO_DESCRIPTION:
[150-200 word episode description for Spotify/Apple — keyword in first sentence — tells listener exactly what they will learn]

KEY_TAKEAWAYS:
- [Specific takeaway 1 from episode]
- [Specific takeaway 2]
- [Specific takeaway 3]
- [Specific takeaway 4]
- [Specific takeaway 5]
[Minimum 5, maximum 8 takeaways]

RESOURCES_MENTIONED:
- [Resource 1: name or URL if mentioned verbally]
- [Resource 2]
[Write 'No resources mentioned in this episode' if none found]

TIMESTAMPED_HIGHLIGHTS:
[00:00] Introduction
[MM:SS] [What was discussed at this moment]
[MM:SS] [What was discussed]
[Continue for 6-8 key moments — use exact timestamps from transcript]

GUEST_BIO:
[2-3 sentence guest bio based only on what was said in the episode — or 'Solo episode — no guest' if no guest]

CTA_BLOCK:
[3-4 line CTA block: subscribe + review prompt + link — warm and conversational tone]

FULL_SHOW_NOTES:
[Compile all sections above into one complete show notes block — formatted for copy-paste into Spotify or a website episode page — include all sections in clean readable format]

nodes.name: 11. Google Sheets — Save Show Notes Library

main.node: 11. Google Sheets — Save Show Notes Library
